messages.content:
Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

Missing Authorization vulnerability in Kadence WP Gutenberg Blocks by Kadence Blocks allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects Gutenberg Blocks by Kadence Blocks: from n/a through 3.3.1.

The Kadence WP Gutenberg Blocks, specifically versions up to 3.3.1, have a Missing Authorization vulnerability. This issue is caused by improperly configured access control settings, allowing users to perform unauthorized actions.
